title: Daemon key exchange: ECDH + PSK-authenticated HKDF + hello/hello-ack
description: Verify the full key exchange protocol on the daemon side, including MITM detection

steps.action: Authenticate, then send key-exchange message with a valid X25519 public key
steps.expected: Daemon responds with its own key-exchange message containing a 32-byte base64 public key

steps.action: Derive session key locally (same algorithm), encrypt hello message, send it
Decrypt hello-ack with local session key
Authenticate and send key-exchange, but use wrong PSK for session key derivation, send hello
steps.expected: Daemon closes with code 4002 (decryption failed — MITM detection)

steps.action: Authenticate but do not send key-exchange for 5 seconds
steps.expected: Daemon closes with code 4001 (key exchange timeout)

steps.action: Verify daemon generates new ephemeral keypair per connection
steps.expected: Two connections produce different daemon public keys
